first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations (3/10), and the reasoning is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the core skills gap: the candidate's experience is in TypeScript/Node.js while the role requires modern C++ or Rust, and their C++ experience is over a decade old. The change in university from Bucharest to IIT Bombay did not alter the assessment, which remained focused on job-relevant skills. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the bounds of ordinary run-to-run variation.
